title: Jumpy Boats
description: Make your boat travels easier by making small jumps while in the boat
body: No more will transporting animals and villagers by boat be a pain in the donkey. With this mod installed you can make small jumps while riding a boat enabling you to travel from water onto land and even scale small slopes. Join the Jumpy Boats club today! and get a free splash! See it in action here https://imgur.com/a/A4EAEFg or here Need help? https://discord.gg/k3XJkb2puw [![Sponsor Time](https://jonn.dk/akliz_banner_productivebees.png)](https://www.akliz.net/lobstermods)
